NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON CIVIL CODE 3154 PETITION FOR DECREE TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-11-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: (JUDGMENT ON CIVIL CODE 3154 PETITION FOR DECREE TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NTC OF HRG ON PETITION FOR DECREE TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER DALE, DON B , TRUSTEE OF THE WINIFRED M. DALE TRUST HEARING SET FOR AUG-11-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

ORDER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON CIVIL CODE 3154 PETITION FOR DECREE TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN ; WITH PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER DALE, DON B , TRUSTEE OF THE WINIFRED M. DALE TRUST AS TO RESPONDENT RONCANCIO, REUBEN D

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DON DALE'S PETITION FOR DECREE TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN. AFTER VERIFICATION FROM THE DISCOVERY DEPT. MADE BY THE PETITIONER'S COUNSEL, THAT THE UNDERLYING PETITION IS A LAW AND MOTION MATTER, THE COURT VACATED THE TENTATIVE RULING. HENCE, COUNSEL ARGUED THE MATTER AND THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION UPON REPRESENTATION IN OPEN COURT THAT THE RESPONDENT HAS NO OPPOSITION OR OBJECTION TO THE SAID PETITION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/PHA)ROBERT BALIAN # 5220
